calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Jennifer Brown for and with Arsie Anderson (Petitioner).

The Court questioned the $11,200.00 disbursment. Ms. Brown stated that it should have been $10,802.00, that the declaration had been filed last week, that the deceased Conservatee owned 1/6 interest in real property and that she represented five owners in the partition action. In addition, she reported that the costs for the partition action had been divided equally and that Nancy Rasch and Debra Dolch had executed the settlement agreement which was approved in the civil court. Furthermore she stated that the real estate expenses had been incurred up until the sale, that the siblings were paid back for maintainance on the property, that the $26,000.00 were broken down with receipts, that she received no objections to the letter she sent out to all the parties and that distribution was approved in the settlement agreement in the civil matter. The Court took the matter under submission. Ms. Brown is to submit copies of all the receipts and a copy of the letter she had sent to all parties.

Judicial Officer: Judge John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: M. Loos.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Continued To Apr-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Continued To Mar-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Lynne Brown for the Petitioner.

The Court stated that the issues addressed in the October 17th examiner's notes had not been resolved. Ms. Brown stated that the issues were addressed in the declaration that she filed, and presented an endorsed copy dated yesterday. The matter was continued to March 18, 2008 for further review of the matter.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2007 Continued To Mar-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch in Pro Per and on behalf of Debra Dolch. Jennifer Brown by phone for Arsie Anderson (Petitoner).

Ms. Brown stated that she had received the examiner's notes, that the Conservatee had no spouse and no children, that she was still trying to reach the siblings, and requested a 90 day continuance. Ms. Rasch informed the Court that she was only here for instructions regarding the creditor's claim, that the Court ordered fees to be paid, and that the Conservator had no authority to not pay them. Ms. Brown expressed conern about the large claim from the State of California regarding Medical. The Court stated that the personal representative was allowed to pay fees as previously ordered. The matter was continued to March 4, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Julia Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
